start.content:
Hi, I’m here to support you. 💙

You’re not alone in this journey. Tell me, what’s concerning you about your child?

options.label: I think my child may have autism
I want guidance on what to do next

not_speaking.content:
I understand how worrying that can feel. Many parents go through this.

Let me help you better — does your child try to communicate in other ways?

gesture.content:
That’s actually a positive sign. 💙

Your child is trying to communicate — we just need to guide it towards speech through the right approach.

In our method, we focus on listening first, then speech develops naturally.

low_comm.content:
I know this can feel overwhelming.

But don’t worry — with the right guidance, children can improve significantly.

The key is starting early and following the right approach at home.

not_responding.content:
When a child doesn’t respond, it can feel disconnecting.

This often relates to how they process sounds and interaction.

We focus on building connection first — once that improves, response follows.

autism_doubt.content:
It’s okay to feel unsure.

Autism is not something to fear — it just means your child experiences the world differently.

With the right support, children can grow, learn, and thrive.

options.label: What signs should I look for?

guidance.content:
Here’s what truly helps:

• Start working with your child at home
• Focus on listening and connection
• Be consistent and patient

The biggest change happens when parents are guided properly.

You don’t need to do this alone 💙

booking_name.content:
I’d love to connect you with our expert.

What’s your name?

booking_phone.content:
Thank you 💙

Please share your phone number so we can reach you:

booking_confirm.content:
Thank you for trusting us 💙

Our team will reach out to you shortly and guide you step by step.

You’re not alone in this journey.
